creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
I agree that this is confusing and I remember spending some time
figuring out what I needed to pass to ifconfig the first time that I
setup FreeBSD through PLIP.  Do you have some suggested text to add to
one of the help screens?  Can you please supply a diff or something of
what exactly we should add to make it easier?

     Thanks,
     - Murray
